workflow.name: Send multi-stage customer project emails from Google Sheets with Zoho ZeptoMail
workflow.description:
Keep your clients informed at every stage of their project without lifting a finger. This workflow runs daily from Google Sheets and automatically sends four timed emails a Day 3 progress update, a Day 5 near-completion nudge, a feedback request on project completion, and a post-delivery upsell all via Zoho ZeptoMail. Each email is logged back to the sheet so no message ever sends twice.

## Who it's for

Service businesses (resume writing, LinkedIn optimization, design, freelance agencies) that manage client orders in a Google Sheet and want structured follow-up without a CRM.

## How it works

1. A Schedule Trigger fires daily at 9 AM and reads all rows from your Google Sheet
2. Blank rows are filtered out; date variables are calculated dynamically
3. Four parallel branches check independently whether each email type is due:
   - **T+3** — progress update sent 3 days after the order date
   - **T+5** — near-completion update sent at day 5 (only after T+3 is confirmed sent)
   - **Feedback** — sent once the project status is marked Completed
   - **Upsell** — sent ~3 days after feedback, offering premium add-ons
4. Each qualifying row is looped one at a time, the email is sent via ZeptoMail, and the sheet is updated to prevent re-sends
5. After the upsell sends, the row status is set to **All Done** — permanently stopping all further checks for that customer

## Setup

1. Connect your **Google Sheets** and **Zoho ZeptoMail** credentials in n8n
2. Replace all `YOUR_RESOURCE_ID_HERE` placeholders in the Google Sheets nodes with your actual spreadsheet and sheet IDs
3. Set your sender address in all four email nodes (`YOUR_EMAIL_HERE`)
4. Update the feedback form link and booking link in the Feedback and Upsell email templates
5. Ensure your sheet has these columns: `Customer Name`, `Email`, `Project Type`, `Date Added`, `Status`, `T3_Email_Sent`, `T5_Email_Sent`, `Feedback_Email_Sent`, `Feedback_Email_Date`, `Upsell_Email_Sent`, `original_subject`

## Requirements

- Self-hosted n8n instance (community node required)
- Community node: `n8n-nodes-zohozeptomail`
- Active Zoho ZeptoMail account with a configured mail agent

parameters.content:
## Automate Customer Project Emails
Streamline client updates and feedback requests with automated multi-stage email workflows.


### How it works
1. Fetch daily customer data from Google Sheets.
2. Filter for active clients and incomplete tasks.
3. Calculate target dates for T+3 and T+5 intervals.
4. Trigger personalized emails based on project progress.
5. Log sent status back to Google Sheets.


### Setup
1. Connect Google Sheets and Zoho ZeptoMail credentials.
2. Configure your Resource IDs for the sheets.
3. Add your sender email and links in the email nodes.
4. Install required community nodes (see Important section).


### Customization
Adjust the 'Calculate Date Variables' node to change the delay intervals. Consolidate user-specific values in a Set node at the workflow start for easy configuration.


### Important
 This workflow requires a self-hosted n8n instance. Community nodes used: n8n-nodes-zohozeptomail.zohoZeptomail

nodes.name: Filter Empty Rows
nodes.notes: Skips blank rows. Only rows with a name + email pass through.

nodes.name: Calculate Date Variables
nodes.notes: FIX: t5_window_date is now 10 days (was 9) to catch boundary customers.

value.original_subject: ={{ 'Update on Your ' + $('Loop T+3 (1 at a time)').item.json['Project Type'] + ' Project - We\'re Making Progress!' }}

nodes.name: Is T+5 Email Due?
nodes.notes: FIX: Requires T3_Email_Sent=YES so T+5 never sends before or at the same time as T+3.

nodes.name: Is Feedback Email Due?
nodes.notes: FIX: Added All Done check so completed+upselled customers don't get feedback emails again.

nodes.name: Mark Upsell Email Sent
nodes.notes: Sets Status = All Done after upsell -- stops all future checks for this customer.

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Update on Your ' + $json['Project Type'] + ' Project - We\'re Making Progress!' }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }},

We hope you're doing well! Here's a quick update on your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project.

Day 3 Update: Our team is deep in the research and drafting phase -- making sure every detail reflects your unique skills and experience.

  • Reviewing your background and goals
  • Crafting compelling, ATS-optimized content
  • Aligning your profile with industry standards

If you have any additional info to share (achievements, certifications etc.), feel free to reply to this email!

Estimated completion is just around the corner. Stay tuned!


Warm regards,

The [Your Company] Team

You're receiving this because you have an active project with us.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json['original_subject'] }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }},

Great news -- your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project is well underway and results are taking shape!

Day 5 Update: We're now in the final refinement stage -- polishing the language, optimizing for recruiter attention, and tailoring everything to your goals.

  • Draft content completed
  • ATS keyword optimization done
  • Final quality review in progress

You'll receive the final deliverable very shortly. We can't wait for you to see it!

If there's anything specific you'd like adjusted, just reply to this email.


Best,

The [Your Company] Team

You're receiving this because you have an active project with us.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json['original_subject'] }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }}, your project is complete!

We're thrilled to let you know that your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project has been finalized and delivered. It was a pleasure working with you!

We'd love to hear your thoughts -- it only takes 1 minute and helps us serve our clients better.

Leave Your Feedback

Thank you for trusting us with your career journey!


With gratitude,

The [Your Company] Team

Reply to this email if you have any questions about your deliverable.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json['original_subject'] }}
parameters.htmlbody:
=

Hi {{ $json['Customer Name'] }},

It's been a few days since we wrapped up your {{ $json['Project Type'] }} project -- we hope it's already opening doors for you!

We wanted to share some premium services that could take your career even further:

LinkedIn Optimization3x more recruiter views
Cover Letter BundleCustom letters for your top 5 roles
Interview Prep Session1-on-1 mock interview coaching
Job Application StrategyCustomized job hunt roadmap

As a returning client, use code RETURN15 for an exclusive 15% discount. Offer valid for 7 days.

Explore Premium Services

Cheering you on,

The [Your Company] Team

To unsubscribe, reply with 'Unsubscribe'.

parameters.content:
## 1. Trigger & Data Retrieval
Polls the sheet daily and filters out blank rows.

## 2. Logic & Scheduling
Calculates dynamic dates and checks email due status.

## 3. Communication & Logging
Sends emails via ZeptoMail and updates Google Sheets.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.

data.details: The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
